message:
fix: pass --branch to bare clone in gt rig add

When users specify --branch with gt rig add, the flag was being ignored
for the bare repo clone (.repo.git). The CloneBare* functions had no
branch parameter, so git always cloned the remote HEAD branch.

Add CloneBareWithBranch and related variants to git.go; refactor
manager.go clone logic into a cloneBareWith closure that passes the
user-specified branch through to all bare clone variants.

Add TestAddRig_BranchFlag to cover the scenario.

Fixes #2940
